# identical

**Type Property**

The results are identical.

## Declaration

```swift
static let identical: NWBrowser.Result.Change.Flags
```

## Change Flags

- **interfaceAdded**: The service was discovered over a new interface.
- **interfaceRemoved**: The service was no longer discovered over a certain interface.
- **metadataChanged**: The service’s associated metadata changed.

items.description: The service was discovered over a new interface.
items.name: interfaceAdded

items.description: The service was no longer discovered over a certain interface.
